context: Tests whether the agent catches stale or unsupported App Store Optimization claims and replaces them with current skill guidance.

checklist.name: CPP limit
checklist.description: Corrects Custom Product Pages to the current 70-page limit.

checklist.name: CPP search
checklist.description: States that approved Custom Product Pages can appear in App Store search for assigned keywords, not only direct links.

checklist.name: PPO treatments
checklist.description: Corrects Product Page Optimization to up to three treatments against the original product page.

checklist.name: PPO localizations
checklist.description: Mentions selected localizations or that all supported localizations are selected by default.

checklist.name: No position folklore
checklist.description: Rejects unsupported keyword-position ranking claims and repeated-keyword tactics.

checklist.name: Description conversion
checklist.description: Keeps description guidance conversion-focused and avoids keyword stuffing.

checklist.name: Event copy
checklist.description: Frames In-App Event name and short description as visible event-card/search-result copy rather than a hidden keyword field.

checklist.name: No hard thresholds
checklist.description: Removes generic cross-locale English-indexing and fixed rating-threshold claims while preserving per-market research and ratings/reviews as signals.
